Prologue: ^The temperature is reaching almost forty degrees.
^A man just steps out from his office for lunch break.
^Oh my god, so hot… My skin is gonna melt in no time…
^Oh, isn’t that the top student, Ryan?
^Want to grab some ice cream with me?
^Ryan and Vallerie goes into the convenient store nearby.
^You know, I really miss these kinds of moments.
^Remember when you would always eat three strawberry ice creams in high school?
^I just noticed, you're only eating one instead of three and it’s a vanilla, not strawberry. What's going on?
^…I am having a really hard time right now.
^Do you have any side job recommendations? I will do anything.
^Vallerie smirks and changes his expression quickly.
^Well, it’s a shame you have to go through all of that… Alone.
^I do have a recommendation for you.
^It’s a little weird for someone like you, but would you mind hearing about it?
^See this ice cream stick right here?
^Vallerie strikes near a stick and it lands on another.
^You just need to beat every competitor there.
^Sure. We should find a room for that.
